name: 'Huayan' Fleet Banquet Suite
desc: Zenith Era's highest-tier fleet catering package, built around formal banquet logistics, luxury mess services, and morale systems that make long deployments feel less like punishment.

name: 'Huayan' Banquet Effect
desc: Hidden effect marker for ships receiving Huayan-tier fleet catering benefits.

name: 'Jing Cuisine' Fine Dining Suite
desc: A refined fleet catering package that improves crew endurance through premium meals, disciplined service routines, and cleaner shipboard morale management.

name: 'Jing Cuisine' Dining Effect
desc: Hidden effect marker for ships receiving Jing Cuisine fleet catering benefits.

name: 'Chanshan' Galley Suite
desc: A practical Zenith galley package that standardizes fleet meals, crew rotation support, and small comfort routines across an active deployment.

name: 'Chanshan' Galley Effect
desc: Hidden effect marker for ships receiving Chanshan fleet catering benefits.

name: 'Coarse Food' Mess Suite
desc: A basic but reliable fleet mess package that keeps crews fed, organized, and just comfortable enough to stay useful during extended operations.

name: 'Coarse Food' Mess Effect
desc: Hidden effect marker for ships receiving basic fleet catering benefits.

name: 'Resonance' Common Navigation Core
desc: A Zenith navigation core that links fleet drive telemetry through a shared resonance model, reducing fuel waste across long voyages.

name: Zenith Hospitality Suite
desc: A luxury service package that turns spare shipboard space into entertainment, officer comfort, cleaner berthing, and onboard maintenance support.

name: 'Starshine' Aviation Dispatch
desc: Flicker Aviation's flagship carrier dispatch suite, expanding wing persistence through quantum links, automated launch control, and aggressive deck cycling.

name: Night Star Command Net
desc: A layered fighter command network that improves range, handling, and strike timing for wings operating from the Night Star platform.

name: Borealis Flight Control
desc: A Borealis-pattern flight control suite that increases simultaneous fighter deployment through reinforced deck control and secondary launch coordination.

name: Amagi Flight Control
desc: An Amagi-pattern dispatch suite that accelerates fighter replacement while extending command range for carrier strike operations.

name: Biological Synergy System
desc: An Exodyne-linked biological control package that lets ship systems push compatible bionic craft into dangerous short-duration performance states.

name: Bionic Combat Assistant
desc: A sanitized combat-assist package derived from Exodyne work, improving strikecraft control without requiring crews to ask too many questions about its ancestry.

name: Bionic Automation Suite
desc: A Monolith automation suite integrating Exodyne-derived control logic with doctrinally acceptable ship handling and weapon cycling support.

name: Valkyrie Pursuit Kit
desc: A pursuit-focused refit package tuned for Valkyrie mercenary doctrine, rewarding aggressive pressure against vulnerable or retreating targets.

name: Composite Aviation Forge Cluster
desc: A massive Monolith aviation forge cluster built for Luddic carrier doctrine, replenishing replacement craft with industrial speed and very little elegance.

name: Plasma Power Generator
desc: A compact plasma-generation package that improves flux storage, flux dissipation, and energy weapon efficiency on compatible hulls.

name: Energy Swarm Core
desc: A classified Yunze swarm-control core that maintains defensive energy swarms around the ship. Compatible systems can retune the swarm behavior for specialized roles.
sModDesc: Increases the maintained swarm limit by 20%%.

name: Ion-Charged Armor
desc: A charged armor lattice that stores defensive energy across the hull. While charged, the system reduces EMP, armor, and direct hull damage taken by the ship.
sModDesc: Improves charge recovery to 0.75%% per second and reduces charge loss from hits.

name: Fusion Overload Furnace Core
desc: A Tianhong relic furnace able to feed extreme flux, shield, and EMP-resistance demands on the Earth Deity platform.

name: Quantum Cluster Computer
desc: A Tianhong quantum cluster computer that coordinates weapon range, target locks, point defense control, and system timing on the Earth Deity platform.

name: Anti-Entropic Hull
desc: An anomalous hull state that converts hostile thermodynamic behavior into impossible durability and weapon performance.
